scripts.ci:test: npm run docker:build && (docker run --rm --ipc=host -v "$(pwd)/playwright-report:/app/playwright-report" vrt-runner; ret=$?; npm run report:pdf && exit $ret)
scripts.ci:test:update: npm run docker:build && (curl -sf -o /dev/null http://localhost:5173/ || (echo 'Dev server not reachable on :5173 — start it first: npm run dev' && exit 1)) && docker run --rm --ipc=host -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:5173/ -v "$(pwd)/tests:/app/tests" vrt-runner npx playwright test --update-snapshots
